title: SL based on exposure to PF (User-Defined) — Indicator by pankajchauhan9355 — TradingView
source: //@version=6indicator("SL based on exposure to PF (User-Defined)", overlay=true, scale = scale.none)// Ask the user for the number of levels to plot (1-5 levels) via checkboxesshow_level_1 = input.bool(true, title="Show Exposure Level 1")show_level_2 = input.bool(true, title="Show Exposure Level 2")show_level_3 = input.bool(true, title="Show Exposure Level 3")show_level_4 = input.bool(true, title="Show Exposure Level 4")show_level_5 = input.bool(false, title="Show Exposure Level 5")  // Default to falseshow_price_level_1 = input.bool(false, title="Show price Level 1")show_price_level_2 = input.bool(false, title="Show price Level 2")show_price_level_3 = input.bool(false, title="Show price Level 3")// Get the live price (last traded price) of the chart's symbol on the current timeframelive_price = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, timeframe.period, close, lookahead=barmerge.lookahead_on)// User Inputsportfolio_val = input(3000000, title="Portfolio Value")position_size = input(16.66, title="Position Size (%)")/100// Assuming live_price is availablenum_share = math.floor((portfolio_val * position_size) / live_price)// Ask the user to provide percentage levels (1-5)percent1 = input.float(0.1, title="Level 1 | Pf % | Default(.1%)", inline="level1")/100percent2 = input.float(0.2, title="Level 2 | Pf % | Default(.2%)", inline="level2")/100percent3 = input.float(0.3, title="Level 3 | Pf % | Default(.3%)", inline="level3")/100percent4 = input.float(0.4, title="Level 4 | Pf % | Default(.4%)", inline="level4")/100percent5 = input.float(0.5, title="Level 5 | Pf % | Default(.5%)", inline="level5")/100// Calculate percentage levels based on the live pricelevel1_price = live_price - (portfolio_val*percent1)/num_sharelevel2_price = live_price - (portfolio_val*percent2)/num_sharelevel3_price = live_price - (portfolio_val*percent3)/num_sharelevel4_price = live_price - (portfolio_val*percent4)/num_sharelevel5_price = live_price - (portfolio_val*percent5)/num_shareprice_level_1 = input.float(1, title="% Price down from curr price | Default(1%)", inline="level1")/100price_level_2 = input.float(3, title="% Price down from curr price | Default(1%) Default(2%)", inline="level2")/100price_level_3 = input.float(5, title="% Price down from curr price | Default(1%)| Default(3%)", inline="level3")/100// Price in % from curr priceprice_1 = live_price*(1-price_level_1)price_2 = live_price*(1-price_level_2)price_3 = live_price*(1-price_level_3)// Check if this is the last baris_last_bar = (bar_index == last_bar_index)// Plot lines, labels, and annotate the live price used for calculationsif is_last_bar    label.new(bar_index + 15, live_price, str.tostring(num_share), color=color.white, textcolor=color.white, style=label.style_none)    // Conditional plotting based on user input (checkboxes)    if show_level_1        line.new(bar_index, level1_price, bar_index + 4, level1_price, color=color.white, width=1, style=line.style_dashed)        label.new(bar_index + 10, level1_price, str.tostring(percent1*100) + "% | " + str.tostring(level1_price, "#.1"), color=color.white, textcolor=color.white, style=label.style_none)            if show_level_2        line.new(bar_index, level2_price, bar_index + 4, level2_price, color=color.white, width=1, style=line.style_dashed)        label.new(bar_index + 10, level2_price, str.tostring(percent2*100) + "% | " + str.tostring(level2_price, "#.1"), color=color.white, textcolor=color.white, style=label.style_none)    if show_level_3        line.new(bar_index, level3_price, bar_index + 4, level3_price, color=color.white, width=1, style=line.style_dashed)        label.new(bar_index + 10, level3_price, str.tostring(percent3*100) + "% | " + str.tostring(level3_price, "#.1"), color=color.white, textcolor=color.white, style=label.style_none)    if show_level_4        line.new(bar_index, level4_price, bar_index + 4, level4_price, color=color.white, width=1, style=line.style_dashed)        label.new(bar_index + 10, level4_price, str.tostring(percent4*100) + "% | " + str.tostring(level4_price, "#.1"), color=color.white, textcolor=color.white, style=label.style_none)    if show_level_5        line.new(bar_index, level5_price, bar_index + 4, level5_price, color=color.white, width=1, style=line.style_dashed)        label.new(bar_index + 10, level5_price, str.tostring(percent5*100) + "% | " + str.tostring(level5_price, "#.1"), color=color.white, textcolor=color.white, style=label.style_none)    if show_price_level_1        line.new(bar_index + 2, price_1, bar_index + 3, price_1, color=color.rgb(232, 235, 236), width=1, style=line.style_solid)    if show_price_level_2        line.new(bar_index + 2, price_2, bar_index + 3, price_2, color=color.rgb(232, 235, 236), width=1, style=line.style_solid)    if show_price_level_3        line.new(bar_index + 2, price_3, bar_index + 3, price_3, color=color.rgb(232, 235, 236), width=1, style=line.style_solid)// User inputs for toggling a message. Helps sticking to a process. darkMode = input.bool(false, title = 'Enable Dark Mode')showDisclaimer = input.string('None', title = 'Trade plan', options = ['Trading', 'Not trading', 'None'])tablePosition = input.string('top_right', title = 'Table Position', options = ['top_right', 'bottom_right'])userDisclaimer = ''if showDisclaimer == 'Trading'    userDisclaimer := 'Trading Today! Stick to the selected stock!!'else    userDisclaimer := 'Not trading Today! Turn off the screen!!! Drawdown is happening!!'// Tablevar table disclaimerTable = table.new(position = tablePosition == 'top_right' ? position.top_right : position.bottom_right, columns = 1, rows = 1)textColor = darkMode ? color.white : color.blackif showDisclaimer != 'None'    table.cell(disclaimerTable, 0, 0, userDisclaimer, text_color = textColor, text_size = size.large, text_formatting = text.format_none)
description: SL based on Exposure to PF (User-Defined) is a portfolio risk management indicator designed to help traders visualize stop-loss levels based on how much of their total portfolio they are willing to risk on a position. Instead of using arbitrary price percentages, this tool converts portfolio exposure into actionable price levels directly on the chart.Simply enter your total portfolio value and position size, and the script automatically calculates the number of shares/contracts held. It then plots up to five customizable stop-loss levels based on selected percentages of portfolio risk (for example: risking 0.1%, 0.2%, 0.3%, etc. of total capital). This gives you a clearer understanding of where price should move before a defined portfolio drawdown is reached.Additional optional price-drop levels can also be displayed (such as 1%, 3%, 5% below current price) for quick market context.The script also includes a built-in trading discipline reminder panel where users can display messages such as Trading Today or Not Trading Today, helping reinforce consistency and emotional control.Key Features:Risk-based stop-loss levels using total portfolio exposureAutomatic position sizing based on live market priceUp to 5 customizable portfolio risk levelsOptional fixed % price-drop markersClean chart overlays with labelsTrading discipline reminder panelSupports dark/light mode display preferencesBest For:Swing tradersPosition tradersRisk-focused investorsTraders managing multiple accounts or larger capital basesThis indicator helps turn portfolio risk into precise chart levels, making stop-loss planning more structured, disciplined, and repeatable.

name: IQ5TvpKs
title: VIX Fix VIX Strategy by lm_h — TradingView
source: // This Pine Script® code is subject to the terms of the Mozilla Public License 2.0 at https://mozilla.org/MPL/2.0/// © lm_h//@version=6// =========================================================================// ATTRIBUTION// =========================================================================//// This strategy is a modified version of @ChrisMoody's great interpretation of the VIX Fix by Larry Williams.//// Original script: https://de.tradingview.com/script/og7JPrRA-CM-Williams-Vix-Fix-Finds-Market-Bottoms/// // =========================================================================// MOTIVATION AND CHANGES// =========================================================================//// The motivation of the following changes was the goal to have a profitabel strategy of the WVF which also captures strong upward moves.// First I built it around the SP500 but then I tried different symbol and ended up with the VIX as my favorite symbol.// It may sound weird to use a volatility indicator on the Volatility index but it makes a lot of sense, since it has (more or less) no triangledown// and is mean reverting. So the formular for the WVF is perfect as an indicator of these sharp movements.//// - I changed the formular of the WVF. I changed the calculation of the original wvf (here wvfh) and added the wvfl, //      basically the same but with the intention to capture aggressive bullish behavior, together they are the wvf.// - I kept the percentile based ranges and the BB of the WVF but changed the source to the modified WVF// - Added a MA of WVF and factorized MAs of wvfh and wvfl as entry/exit conditions// - Added MACD for entry confirmation (especially lower or upper timeframe confirmation)// - Implemented the indicator into a strategy with basic long and short rules as well as a simple StopLoss rules// - Added a Option-simulator (at least that was the idea) and automatic selling when the future contract expires// - Added a Buy and Sell stop level function which drastically reduced the loosing long entries on VIX (Turn it off to see how bad it was)//// - Skript was commented with the help of AI//// =========================================================================// HOW I USED IT// =========================================================================//// The default settings are my favorite for trading the VIX-Future on the 4h-timeframe.// I personally think it's powerful on the VIX as a kind of hedging indicator against the market.// // If you use it on another symbol you may change some settings, especially the buy and sell stop level.// // // =========================================================================// DISCLAIMER// =========================================================================//// This script is provided for informational and educational purposes only and does not constitute financial, investment, trading, or tax advice.// It does not take into account your personal circumstances, objectives or risk tolerance. // Trading involves substantial risk and can result in the loss of all invested capital. // Use at your own risk. The author accepts no liability for any losses or damages arising from its use.// // ============================================================================// VIX Fix VIX hedging Strategy // ============================================================================strategy(title = "VIX Fix VIX Strategy", shorttitle = "VIXFixVIX", overlay = false, pyramiding = 5, calc_on_every_tick = true, default_qty_type = strategy.percent_of_equity, default_qty_value = 10, commission_type = strategy.commission.percent, commission_value = 1, slippage = 1, use_bar_magnifier = true)// ============================================================================// SECTION 1: INPUT PARAMETERS - VIX FIX AND BOLLINGER BANDS// ============================================================================// Lookback Period of WVFvfLookback = input.int(22, title="LookBack Period VIX Fix")// Bollinger Bandsbbl = input.int(20, title="Bollinger Band Length")bblStDev = input.float(2.0, "Bollinger Band Standard Deviation Up", 1, 5, 0.01)// High/Low Rangelookback = input.int(50, "Look Back Period Last High/Low")ph = input.float(0.99, "Percentile of Last High - 0.90=90%, 0.95=95%, 0.99=99%", 0, 2, 0.01)pl = input.float(1.01, "Percentile of Last Low - 1.10=90%, 1.05=95%, 1.01=99%", 0, 2, 0.01)// Visualization togglesshowHighLowRange = input.bool(true, title="Show High/Low Range - Based on Percentile and Lookback Period?")showStDev = input.bool(true, title="Show Standard Deviation Line?")// Entry Stop-Level// LonguseBuyStopLevel = input.bool(true, "Use Buy-Level-Stop?", "Above which a buy-signal does not enter a long position.")buyStopLevel = input.int(20, "Buy-Stop-Level", tooltip = "If you use another symbol than VIX, please change.", active = useBuyStopLevel)// Shortshorting = input.bool(true, "Shorting?")useSellLevel = input.bool(true, "Use Short-Selling-Level?", "Above which a sell-signal triggers a short position.", active = shorting)sellLevel = input.int(20, "Short-Selling-Level", tooltip = "If you use another symbol than VIX, please change.", active = useSellLevel and shorting)// Stop LossuseSL = input.bool(false, "Use StopLoss?")stoploss = input.float(0.80, "StopLoss level - 0.80 = 20% below entry", 0, 1, 0.01, active = useSL)// ============================================================================// SECTION 2: INPUT PARAMETERS - MOVING AVERAGES (MA)// ============================================================================// Main plotting Moving Average - applied to WVFMA = "Moving Average"show_ma = input.bool(true, "MA", inline="MA", group = MA, display = display.data_window)ma_type = input.string("SMA", "", inline="MA", group = MA, options=["SMA", "EMA", "SMMA (RMA)", "WMA", "VWMA"])ma_src = input.string("WVF", "", inline="MA", group = MA, options = ["WVF", "Open", "High", "Low", "Close", "HL2", "HLC3", "OHLC4", "HLCC4"], display = display.data_window)ma_length = input.int(20, "", inline="MA", group = MA, minval=1)ma_color = input.color(#ff0055, "", inline="MA", group = MA, display = display.data_window)// MA factorsshow_uppersdev_ma = input.bool(true, "Show Upper Factor of MA", inline = "MA", group = MA)show_lowersdev_ma = input.bool(true, "Show Lower Factor of MA", inline = "MA", group = MA)factor_wvfh_upperBand = input.float(1.1, "Factor Upper MA", 0, 10, 0.01, group = MA)factor_wvfl_lowerBand = input.float(3, "Factor Lower MA", 0, 10, 0.01, group = MA)// ============================================================================// SECTION 3: INPUT PARAMETERS - ENTRY MOVING AVERAGE (Entry optimization)// ============================================================================// MA_entryMA_entry = "MA_entry"use_ma_entry = input.bool(true, "Use MA Entry Optimization?", inline = "MA_entry", group = MA_entry)show_ma_entry = input.bool(true, "MA_entry", inline="MA_entry", group = MA_entry, display = display.data_window)ma_type_entry = input.string("SMMA (RMA)", "", inline="MA_entry", group = MA_entry, options=["SMA", "EMA", "SMMA (RMA)", "WMA", "VWMA"])ma_src_entry = input.source(close, "", inline="MA_entry", group = MA_entry, display = display.data_window)ma_length_entry = input.int(20, "", inline="MA_entry", group = MA_entry, minval=1)ma_color_entry = input.color(color.yellow, "", inline="MA_entry", group = MA_entry, display = display.data_window)ma_faktor_entry = input.float(1.00, "MA Factor Entry", 0, 2, 0.01, tooltip = "Factor for entry MA condition", inline = "MA_entry", group = MA_entry)// ============================================================================// SECTION 4: INPUT PARAMETERS - MACD// ============================================================================// MACDfast_length = input.int(12, "Fast Length", group = "MACD")slow_length = input.int(26, "Slow Length", group = "MACD")macd_src = input.source(close, "MACD Source", group = "MACD")signal_length = input.int(9, "Signal Smoothing", 1, 50, group = "MACD", display = display.data_window)macdtf = input.timeframe("5", "MACD Timeframe", tooltip = "Default: 5-Minute for lower tf reversal confirmation")    // 5-Minute timeframe for some kind of lower tf reversal confirmation// Sell at future contract expirationclose_at_expiration = input.bool(false, "Close position at contract expiration?", "Turn on if you use a non rolling future contract")// Fixed Sell Date: Simulates option expiration dateuse_fixed_selldate = input.bool(true, "Use Fixed Selldate?", "To Simulate Option expiary", active = not close_at_expiration)int dte = input.int(180, "Bars till expiration", tooltip = "To simulate a specific option expiration date", active = use_fixed_selldate)// ============================================================================// SECTION 5: INDICATOR CALCULATIONS// ============================================================================// Williams VIX Fix (WVF)// wvfh: Positive part (Bullish Volatility) - Distance from High (Downward movement)wvfh = ((ta.highest(close, vfLookback) - low) / (ta.highest(close, vfLookback))) * 100// wvfl: Negative part (Bearish Volatility) - Distance from Low (Upward movement)wvfl = ((ta.lowest(close, vfLookback) - high) / (ta.lowest(close, vfLookback))) * 100// wvf: Total volatility indicatorwvf = wvfh + wvfl// MACD[macdLine, signalLine, histLine] = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, macdtf, ta.macd(macd_src, fast_length, slow_length, signal_length))// Bollinger Bands of WVFsDev = bblStDev * ta.stdev(wvf, bbl)midLine = ta.sma(wvf, bbl)lowerBB_wvf = midLine - sDevupperBB_wvf = midLine + sDev// Bollinger Bands for separate wvfh and wvfl//sDevp = bblStDev * ta.stdev(wvfh, bbl)//sDevn = bblStDev * ta.stdev(wvfl, bbl)//upperBand = ta.sma(wvfh, bbl) + sDevp//lowerBand = ta.sma(wvfl, bbl) - sDevn// Range High/LowrangeHigh = (ta.highest(wvf, lookback)) * phrangeLow = (ta.lowest(wvf, lookback)) * pl// ======================================================
description: =========================================================================ATTRIBUTION**=========================================================================**This strategy is a heavily modified version of ChrisMoody's excellent interpretation of the VIX Fix by Larry Williams.Original script: =========================================================================MOTIVATION**=========================================================================**My primary motivation for these modifications was to create a profitable strategy based on the Williams VIX Fix (WVF) that also effectively captures strong upward market moves. While I initially built this around the S&P 500, experimenting with different symbols led me to my absolute favorite underlying asset for this script: the VIX itself.Applying a volatility indicator to a volatility index might sound counterintuitive at first. However, it makes perfect sense: the VIX is structurally mean-reverting and lacks a long-term directional trend. Because of this, the WVF formula acts as an exceptional tool for timing these sharp, mean-reverting volatility spikes.Some people argue that volatility is usually low, and that speculating on higher volatility – as this indicator does when it buys – goes against the market’s nature. In theory, this view has some merit: over long periods, realized and implied volatility tend to fluctuate around a moderate average rather than staying elevated all the time. In practice, however, markets regularly go through distinct high- and low-volatility regimes, and volatility spikes are a recurring feature rather than a rare exception.Looking at historical VIX data since 1990, there has never been a multi-year period without the index rising well above commonly used “stress” levels such as 20. From that perspective, betting on higher volatility from unusually calm conditions can be more intuitive than passively betting on the underlying index itself.==============================================

// This Pine Script® code is subject to the terms of the Mozilla Public License 2.0 at https://mozilla.org/MPL/2.0/// © LuxAlgo//@version=6indicator("Hybrid Round Numbers [LuxAlgo]", shorttitle="Round Numbers Hybrid", overlay=true, max_lines_count=500, max_labels_count=500, max_boxes_count=100)// --- Groups ---string G_GEN = "General Settings"string G_MAJ = "Major Levels"string G_MED = "Medium Levels"string G_MIN = "Minor Levels"string G_ZON = "Reaction Zones (Proximity Mode)"// --- General Inputs ---string viewMode     = input.string("Full", "View Mode", options=["Full", "Proximity"], group=G_GEN, tooltip="Full: Shows all levels based on Count. Proximity: Only shows levels nearest to price with reaction zones.")string spacingMode  = input.string("Auto", "Spacing Mode", options=["Auto", "Manual"], group=G_GEN, tooltip="Auto mode detects MNQ/MES and sets spacing accordingly.")int lineRangeInput  = input.int(100, "Line Extension (Bars)", minval=1, group=G_GEN)int levelsCountIn   = input.int(5, "Full Mode: Levels Count", minval=1, maxval=50, group=G_GEN, tooltip="Number of Major levels to show above and below price in Full mode.")int proximityIn     = input.int(1, "Proximity Mode: Level Count", minval=1, maxval=5, group=G_GEN, tooltip="How many levels above/below to show in Proximity mode.")// --- Spacing Inputs ---float majorSpacingIn  = input.float(100.0, "Major Spacing", minval=0.0000001, group=G_MAJ)float mediumSpacingIn = input.float(50.0, "Medium Spacing", minval=0.0000001, group=G_MED)float minorSpacingIn  = input.float(25.0, "Minor Spacing", minval=0.0000001, group=G_MIN)// --- Style Inputs ---bool showMajor      = input.bool(true, "Show Major Levels", group=G_MAJ)color majorColor    = input.color(color.new(#5b9cf6, 30), "Color", inline="maj", group=G_MAJ)string majorStyle   = input.string(line.style_solid, "Style", options=[line.style_solid, line.style_dotted, line.style_dashed], inline="maj", group=G_MAJ)int majorWidth      = input.int(2, "Width", minval=1, inline="maj", group=G_MAJ)bool showMedium     = input.bool(true, "Show Medium Levels", group=G_MED)color mediumColor   = input.color(color.new(#5b9cf6, 60), "Color", inline="med", group=G_MED)string mediumStyle  = input.string(line.style_dashed, "Style", options=[line.style_solid, line.style_dotted, line.style_dashed], inline="med", group=G_MED)int mediumWidth     = input.int(1, "Width", minval=1, inline="med", group=G_MED)bool showMinor      = input.bool(true, "Show Minor Levels", group=G_MIN)color minorColor    = input.color(color.new(#5b9cf6, 80), "Color", inline="min", group=G_MIN)string minorStyle   = input.string(line.style_dotted, "Style", options=[line.style_solid, line.style_dotted, line.style_dashed], inline="min", group=G_MIN)int minorWidth      = input.int(1, "Width", minval=1, inline="min", group=G_MIN)// --- Reaction Zone Inputs ---bool showZones      = input.bool(true, "Show Zones (Proximity Mode Only)", group=G_ZON)float zoneTicks     = input.float(4.0, "Zone Size (Ticks)", minval=0, group=G_ZON)color zoneColor     = input.color(color.new(#5b9cf6, 90), "Zone Color", group=G_ZON)// --- Logic ---bool isMNQ = str.contains(syminfo.ticker, "MNQ")bool isMES = str.contains(syminfo.ticker, "MES")float majorSpacing  = spacingMode == "Auto" ? (isMNQ ? 1000.0 : isMES ? 100.0 : majorSpacingIn) : majorSpacingInfloat mediumSpacing = spacingMode == "Auto" ? (isMNQ ? 500.0  : isMES ? 50.0  : mediumSpacingIn) : mediumSpacingInfloat minorSpacing  = spacingMode == "Auto" ? (isMNQ ? 100.0  : isMES ? 25.0  : minorSpacingIn) : minorSpacingInfloat zoneOffset = zoneTicks * syminfo.mintick// --- Drawing Arrays ---var line[] linesArray   = array.new_line()var label[] labelsArray = array.new_label()var box[] boxesArray    = array.new_box()clearObjects() =>    if array.size(linesArray) > 0        for l in linesArray            line.delete(l)        array.clear(linesArray)    if array.size(labelsArray) > 0        for lb in labelsArray            label.delete(lb)        array.clear(labelsArray)    if array.size(boxesArray) > 0        for b in boxesArray            box.delete(b)        array.clear(boxesArray)addLevel(float price, color col, string style, int width) =>    int rightOffset = 50 // Extended to the right    array.push(linesArray, line.new(bar_index - lineRangeInput, price, bar_index + rightOffset, price, color=col, style=style, width=width))    array.push(labelsArray, label.new(bar_index + rightOffset, price, str.tostring(price, format.mintick), color=color.new(color.black, 100), textcolor=color.gray, style=label.style_label_left, size=size.small))    if viewMode == "Proximity" and showZones        array.push(boxesArray, box.new(bar_index - lineRangeInput, price + zoneOffset, bar_index + rightOffset, price - zoneOffset, bgcolor=zoneColor, border_color=color.new(col, 80)))if barstate.islast    clearObjects()    float pivot = math.round(close / majorSpacing) * majorSpacing    int count = viewMode == "Full" ? levelsCountIn : proximityIn        // Major    if showMajor        for i = -count to count            addLevel(pivot + (i * majorSpacing), majorColor, majorStyle, majorWidth)    // Medium    if showMedium        int medRange = math.ceil(count * (majorSpacing / mediumSpacing))        for i = -medRange to medRange            float level = pivot + (i * mediumSpacing)            bool isOverlappingMajor = math.abs(level / majorSpacing - math.round(level / majorSpacing)) < 0.0001            bool inBounds = level <= pivot + (count * majorSpacing) and level >= pivot - (count * majorSpacing)            if not (showMajor and isOverlappingMajor) and inBounds                addLevel(level, mediumColor, mediumStyle, mediumWidth)    // Minor (Only in Full Mode, or if specifically desired in Proximity)    if showMinor        int minRange = math.ceil(count * (majorSpacing / minorSpacing))        for i = -minRange to minRange            float level = pivot + (i * minorSpacing)            bool isOverlappingMajor = math.abs(level / majorSpacing - math.round(level / majorSpacing)) < 0.0001            bool isOverlappingMedium = math.abs(level / mediumSpacing - math.round(level / mediumSpacing)) < 0.0001            bool inBounds = level <= pivot + (count * majorSpacing) and level >= pivot - (count * majorSpacing)            if not ((showMajor and isOverlappingMajor) or (showMedium and isOverlappingMedium)) and inBounds                addLevel(level, minorColor, minorStyle, minorWidth)// --- Alerts ---float nearestMajor  = math.round(close / majorSpacing) * majorSpacingfloat nearestMedium = math.round(close / mediumSpacing) * mediumSpacingif ta.cross(close, nearestMajor) and showMajor    alert("Price crossed Major level: " + str.tostring(nearestMajor), alert.freq_once_per_bar)if ta.cross(close, nearestMedium) and showMedium and math.abs(nearestMedium / majorSpacing - math.round(nearestMedium / majorSpacing)) > 0.0001    alert("Price crossed Medium level: " + str.tostring(nearestMedium), alert.freq_once_per_bar)
description: Smart Round Number Indicator (MES & MNQ)This indicator highlights key psychological price levels and helps traders focus on where price is most likely to react—without cluttering the chart.🔑 Core FeaturesAutomatic DetectionDetects MES and MNQ automaticallyApplies optimized spacing:MES → 100 / 50 / 25MNQ → 1000 / 500 / 100🎯 Two Display Modes1. Full ModeDisplays all Major, Medium, and Minor levelsIdeal for big-picture analysis and mapping liquidity zones2. Proximity Mode (Scalping Focus)Shows only the nearest levels above and below priceReduces clutter for precision trading🟦 Reaction ZonesEach level includes a shaded zone (customizable in ticks)Represents areas where price is likely to:reactreverseconsolidate🚨 Two-Tier AlertsZone Touch: Price enters the reaction zoneLevel Sweep: Price crosses the exact round number🎨 Full CustomizationAdjust:spacing (auto or manual)colorsline styles (solid, dashed, dotted)line thicknessnumber of levels shownCustomize Major, Medium, and Minor levels independently🧠 Smart LogicPrevents overlapping levelsAutomatically prioritizes Major levels over MediumKeeps charts clean and readable📍 Improved VisibilityRight-aligned labels and extended linesClean layout optimized for real-time decision-making⚡ Best Use CaseIdeal for scalpers and intraday tradersHelps identify:liquidity sweepsreaction zoneshigh-probability entry and exit levels

name: 1H Rejection Wick CE Zones
title: 1H Rejection Wick CE Zones — Indicator by Bayless24 — TradingView
source: //@version=6indicator("1H Rejection Wick CE Zones (Updated Invalidation)", overlay=true, max_boxes_count=500, max_lines_count=500, max_labels_count=500)//=========================// Inputs//=========================tfInput = input.timeframe("60", "Detection Timeframe")minWickPts = input.float(25.0, "Min Wick Size (pts)", step=0.25)minWickPct = input.float(50.0, "Min Wick % of Candle", step=0.1)maxOppWickPct = input.float(50.0, "Max Opposite Wick % of Rejection Wick", step=0.1)sweepBars = input.int(10, "Sweep Lookback", minval=10)showLabel = input.bool(true, "Show CE Label")boxTransparency = input.int(75, "Box Transparency", minval=0, maxval=100)extendHours = input.int(5, "Additional 1H Candles To Extend", minval=1)failureDistance = input.float(100.0, "Invalidate After Close Through CE + Distance", step=0.25)//=========================// 1H Data//=========================[oH, hH, lH, cH, tH] = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, tfInput, [open, high, low, close, time], barmerge.gaps_off, barmerge.lookahead_off)newBar = ta.change(tH) != 0// Previous closed 1H candle = candidate setup candleo = oH[1]h = hH[1]l = lH[1]c = cH[1]t = tH[1]//=========================// Candle math helpers//=========================f_bearShape(_o, _h, _l, _c, _minWickPts, _minWickPct, _maxOppWickPct) =>    _bodyTop = math.max(_o, _c)    _bodyBot = math.min(_o, _c)    _range = _h - _l    _upperWick = _h - _bodyTop    _lowerWick = _bodyBot - _l    _upperPct = _range > 0 ? (_upperWick / _range) * 100 : 0    _upperWick >= _minWickPts and _upperPct > _minWickPct and _lowerWick < _upperWick * (_maxOppWickPct / 100)f_bullShape(_o, _h, _l, _c, _minWickPts, _minWickPct, _maxOppWickPct) =>    _bodyTop = math.max(_o, _c)    _bodyBot = math.min(_o, _c)    _range = _h - _l    _upperWick = _h - _bodyTop    _lowerWick = _bodyBot - _l    _lowerPct = _range > 0 ? (_lowerWick / _range) * 100 : 0    _lowerWick >= _minWickPts and _lowerPct > _minWickPct and _upperWick < _lowerWick * (_maxOppWickPct / 100)//=========================// Candidate candle calculations//=========================bodyTop = math.max(o, c)bodyBot = math.min(o, c)candleRange = h - lupperWick = h - bodyToplowerWick = bodyBot - lupperPct = candleRange > 0 ? (upperWick / candleRange) * 100 : 0lowerPct = candleRange > 0 ? (lowerWick / candleRange) * 100 : 0//=========================// Sweep logic//=========================prevHigh = ta.highest(hH[2], sweepBars)prevLow = ta.lowest(lH[2], sweepBars)bearSweep = h > prevHighbullSweep = l < prevLow//=========================// Valid rejection wick setup//=========================bearValid = bearSweep and upperWick >= minWickPts and upperPct > minWickPct and lowerWick < upperWick * (maxOppWickPct / 100)bullValid = bullSweep and lowerWick >= minWickPts and lowerPct > minWickPct and upperWick < lowerWick * (maxOppWickPct / 100)//=========================// Active setup storage//=========================var bool active = falsevar bool activeBear = falsevar float activeCE = navar int activeStartTime = navar int activeInvalidationDeadline = navar bool ceTapped = falsevar bool closedThroughCE = falsevar box activeBox = navar line activeLine = navar label activeLabel = na//=========================// Create setup immediately after candle close//=========================if newBar and (bearValid or bullValid)    // Overwrite old active setup    if active        box.delete(activeBox)        line.delete(activeLine)        if showLabel and not na(activeLabel)            label.delete(activeLabel)    active := true    activeBear := bearValid    ceTapped := false    closedThroughCE := false    activeStartTime := t    activeInvalidationDeadline := t + (3 * 60 * 60 * 1000)    float top = na    float bottom = na    if activeBear        top := h        bottom := bodyTop    else        top := bodyBot        bottom := l    activeCE := (top + bottom) / 2.0    leftTime = t    rightTime = t + (extendHours * 60 * 60 * 1000)    activeBox := box.new(         left = leftTime,         top = top,         right = rightTime,         bottom = bottom,         xloc = xloc.bar_time,         bgcolor = color.new(color.black, boxTransparency),         border_color = color.new(color.black, 0)     )    activeLine := line.new(         x1 = leftTime,         y1 = activeCE,         x2 = rightTime,         y2 = activeCE,         xloc = xloc.bar_time,         color = color.black,         style = line.style_dotted,         width = 2     )    if showLabel        activeLabel := label.new(             x = rightTime,             y = activeCE,             xloc = xloc.bar_time,             text = "CE: " + str.tostring(activeCE, format.mintick),             style = label.style_label_left,             color = color.black,             textcolor = color.white,             size = size.small         )//=========================// Track CE tap//=========================if active and not ceTapped    if high >= activeCE and low <= activeCE        ceTapped := true//=========================// Track close-through of CE//=========================if active and not ceTapped    if activeBear and close > activeCE        closedThroughCE := true    if (not activeBear) and close < activeCE        closedThroughCE := true//=========================// Opposing wick invalidation before CE tap//=========================if active and not ceTapped    withinInvalidationWindow = tH <= activeInvalidationDeadline    currBearOpp = f_bearShape(oH[1], hH[1], lH[1], cH[1], minWickPts, minWickPct, maxOppWickPct)    currBullOpp = f_bullShape(oH[1], hH[1], lH[1], cH[1], minWickPts, minWickPct, maxOppWickPct)    invalidatedByOppWick = withinInvalidationWindow and (         (activeBear and currBullOpp) or         ((not activeBear) and currBearOpp)    )    if invalidatedByOppWick        box.delete(activeBox)        line.delete(activeLine)        if showLabel and not na(activeLabel)            label.delete(activeLabel)        active := false//=========================// Invalidate after close through CE + 100 pts beyond//=========================if active and not ceTapped and closedThroughCE    invalidatedByDistance = false    if activeBear        invalidatedByDistance := high >= (activeCE + failureDistance)    else        invalidatedByDistance := low <= (activeCE - failureDistance)    if invalidatedByDistance        box.delete(activeBox)        line.delete(activeLine)        if showLabel and not na(activeLabel)            label.delete(activeLabel)        active := false//=========================// Alerts//=========================alertcondition(newBar and bearValid, "Bear Wick", "Bearish 1H rejection wick detected")alertcondition(newBar and bullValid, "Bull Wick", "Bullish 1H rejection wick detected")alertcondition(active and not ceTapped and high >= activeCE and low <= activeCE, "CE Tap", "CE tapped")
description: CE of 1HR rejection wicks marked off for easy visibility

name: Levels of Greed KenshinC
title: Levels of Greed (KenshinC) — Indicator by KenshinC — TradingView
source: //@version=5indicator("Levels of Greed (KenshinC)", overlay=true, max_labels_count=500, max_lines_count=500)// ── Inputs ─────────────────────────────────────calc_mode     = input.string(defval="Manual", options=["Auto", "Manual", "Dynamic by Market Cap"], title="Calculation Mode")// Auto Modelength        = input.int(defval=500, minval=50, maxval=2000, title="Length (used in Auto mode)")// Multipliermultiplier    = input.float(defval=10.0, minval=2.0, maxval=100.0, step=0.5, title="Multiplier")// Manual Modemanual_low    = input.float(defval=15760.0, title="Manual Low Price (default = 2022 Low)")// Start Date - Default is the lowest price day of BTC in 2022 (Nov 21, 2022)start_date    = input.time(defval=timestamp("2022-11-21"), title="Start Date (lines begin from this date)")display_mode  = input.string(defval="Cool Guys Mode", options=["Cool Guys Mode", "Serious Guys Mode"], title="Label Display Mode")// ── Determine fixed_low based on mode ─────────────────────────fixed_low = switch calc_mode    "Auto"                  => nz(ta.lowest(low, length)[1], ta.lowest(low, length))    "Dynamic by Market Cap" => manual_low   // You can improve this logic later if needed    => manual_lowfixed_high = fixed_low * multiplierstep_size = (fixed_high - fixed_low) / 9greed_level_1 = fixed_low + 1 * step_sizegreed_level_2 = fixed_low + 2 * step_sizegreed_level_3 = fixed_low + 3 * step_sizegreed_level_4 = fixed_low + 4 * step_sizegreed_level_5 = fixed_low + 5 * step_sizegreed_level_6 = fixed_low + 6 * step_sizegreed_level_7 = fixed_low + 7 * step_sizegreed_level_8 = fixed_low + 8 * step_sizegreed_level_9 = fixed_low + 9 * step_sizegreed_levels_color = color.new(color.green, 0)// ── Calculate x_start from Start Date ─────────────────var int x_start = naif barstate.isfirst or ta.change(start_date) != 0    for i = 0 to 5000        if time[i] <= start_date and (i == 0 or time[i+1] > start_date)            x_start := bar_index - i            breakx_start := na(x_start) ? bar_index - 730 : x_start// ── Variables ──────────────────────────────────var line base_line = navar line l1 = navar line l2 = navar line l3 = navar line l4 = navar line l5 = navar line l6 = navar line l7 = navar line l8 = navar line l9 = navar line top_line = navar label lbl1 = navar label lbl2 = navar label lbl3 = navar label lbl4 = navar label lbl5 = navar label lbl6 = navar label lbl7 = navar label lbl8 = navar label lbl9 = na// ── Update condition ───────────────────────────low_changed    = not na(fixed_low) and ta.change(fixed_low) != 0start_changed  = ta.change(start_date) != 0multi_changed  = ta.change(multiplier) != 0manual_changed = ta.change(manual_low) != 0mode_changed   = calc_mode != calc_mode[1]update_now     = barstate.isfirst or low_changed or start_changed or multi_changed or manual_changed or mode_changed// ── Draw Lines ─────────────────────────────────if update_now    line.delete(base_line)    line.delete(l1)    line.delete(l2)    line.delete(l3)    line.delete(l4)    line.delete(l5)    line.delete(l6)    line.delete(l7)    line.delete(l8)    line.delete(l9)    line.delete(top_line)    x_end = bar_index + 100    base_line := line.new(x_start, fixed_low,  x_end, fixed_low,  extend=extend.both, color=greed_levels_color, width=1)    l1        := line.new(x_start, greed_level_1, x_end, greed_level_1, extend=extend.both, color=greed_levels_color, width=1)    l2        := line.new(x_start, greed_level_2, x_end, greed_level_2, extend=extend.both, color=greed_levels_color, width=2)    l3        := line.new(x_start, greed_level_3, x_end, greed_level_3, extend=extend.both, color=greed_levels_color, width=3)    l4        := line.new(x_start, greed_level_4, x_end, greed_level_4, extend=extend.both, color=greed_levels_color, width=4)    l5        := line.new(x_start, greed_level_5, x_end, greed_level_5, extend=extend.both, color=greed_levels_color, width=5)    l6        := line.new(x_start, greed_level_6, x_end, greed_level_6, extend=extend.both, color=greed_levels_color, width=6)    l7        := line.new(x_start, greed_level_7, x_end, greed_level_7, extend=extend.both, color=greed_levels_color, width=7)    l8        := line.new(x_start, greed_level_8, x_end, greed_level_8, extend=extend.both, color=greed_levels_color, width=8)    l9        := line.new(x_start, greed_level_9, x_end, greed_level_9, extend=extend.both, color=greed_levels_color, width=9)    top_line  := line.new(x_start, fixed_high, x_end, fixed_high, extend=extend.both, color=greed_levels_color, width=1)// ── Create Labels once ─────────────────────────if update_now    label.delete(lbl1)    label.delete(lbl2)    label.delete(lbl3)    label.delete(lbl4)    label.delete(lbl5)    label.delete(lbl6)    label.delete(lbl7)    label.delete(lbl8)    label.delete(lbl9)    coolmode = display_mode == "Cool Guys Mode"    offset = 8    if coolmode        lbl1 := label.new(bar_index + offset, greed_level_1, "😌 Calm",           style=label.style_label_left, textcolor=color.white, color=color.black, size=size.small)        lbl2 := label.new(bar_index + offset, greed_level_2, "🤔 Thinking",       style=label.style_label_left, textcolor=color.white, color=color.black, size=size.small)        lbl3 := label.new(bar_index + offset, greed_level_3, "🤨 Excited",        style=label.style_label_left, textcolor=color.white, color=color.black, size=size.small)        lbl4 := label.new(bar_index + offset, greed_level_4, "😮 Thrilled",       style=label.style_label_left, textcolor=color.white, color=color.black, size=size.small)        lbl5 := label.new(bar_index + offset, greed_level_5, "🤬 Greed",          style=label.style_label_left, textcolor=color.white, color=color.black, size=size.small)        lbl6 := label.new(bar_index + offset, greed_level_6, "😖 Eager",          style=label.style_label_left, textcolor=color.white, color=color.black, size=size.small)        lbl7 := label.new(bar_index + offset, greed_level_7, "😱 Frenzy",         style=label.style_label_left, textcolor=color.white, color=color.black, size=size.small)        lbl8 := label.new(bar_index + offset, greed_level_8, "😵 Crazy",          style=label.style_label_left, textcolor=color.white, color=color.black, size=size.small)        lbl9 := label.new(bar_index + offset, greed_level_9, "💀 Extreme Greed",  style=label.style_label_left, textcolor=color.white, color=color.black, size=size.small)    else        lbl1 := label.new(bar_index + offset, greed_level_1, "1", style=label.style_label_left, textcolor=color.white, color=color.black, size=size.small)        lbl2 := label.new(bar_index + offset, greed_level_2, "2", style=label.style_label_left, textcolor=color.white, color=color.black, size=size.small)        lbl3 := label.new(bar_index + offset, greed_level_3, "3", style=label.style_label_left, textcolor=color.white, color=color.black, size=size.small)        lbl4 := label.new(bar_index + offset, greed_level_4, "4", style=label.style_label_left, textcolor=color.white, color=color.black, size=size.small)        lbl5 := label.new(bar_index + offset, greed_level_5, "5", style=label.style_label_left, textcolor=color.white, color=color.black, size=size.small)        lbl6 := label.new(bar_index + offset, greed_level_6, "6", style=label.style_label_left, textcolor=color.white, color=color.black, size=size.small)        lbl7 := label.new(bar_index + offset, greed_level_7, "7", style=label.style_label_left, textcolor=color.white, color=color.black, size=size.small)        lbl8 := label.new(bar_index + offset, greed_level_8, "8", style=label.style_label_left, textcolor=color.white, color=color.black, size=size.small)        lbl9 := label.new(bar_index + offset, greed_level_9, "9", style=label.style_label_left, textcolor=color.white, color=color.black, size=size.small)// ── Debug plots ────────────────────────────────plot(fixed_low,  title="Fixed Low",  color=color.red,   linewidth=1)plot(fixed_high, title="Fixed High", color=color.orange, linewidth=1)
description: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────//                    🔥 LEVELS OF GREED (KenshinC) 🔥// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────////   Tired of guessing when the market is getting dangerously euphoric?//   Want to see the invisible force of greed directly on your chart?////   Levels of Greed is a powerful psychological visualization tool that //   divides the price range from a major low to extreme greed levels into //   9 clear emotional stages — from "😌 Calm" all the way to "💀 Extreme Greed".////   Each level has increasing line thickness and emotional labels, making it //   incredibly easy to read market sentiment at a glance.////   Whether you're a scalper, swing trader, or long-term holder, this indicator //   helps you://   • Spot when greed is taking over the market//   • Avoid buying at emotional peaks//   • Recognize potential topping zones//   • Stay disciplined during euphoric rallies////   Features://   • 3 Calculation Modes: Auto • Manual • Dynamic by Market Cap//   • Custom Start Date (default: BTC 2022 bottom)//   • Two display modes: "Cool Guys Mode" (with emojis) & "Serious Guys Mode"//   • Clean, extendable horizontal levels with dynamic thickness//   • Works on Bitcoin, altcoins, and any other asset////   "In crypto, price is just a number. //    Greed is the real driver."////   Built with passion by KenshinC 🇻🇳//// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

name: H4 open times
title: H4 open times. — Indicator by ThefocusedTrader — TradingView
source: //@version=5indicator("NY Levels (Session Based)", overlay=true, max_lines_count=100, max_labels_count=100)// === SETTINGS ===lineColor = input.color(color.gray, "Line Color")tz = "America/New_York"// === GET NY TIME ===nyHour = hour(time, tz)nyMin  = minute(time, tz)// === CUSTOM SESSION DAY (STARTS 18:00 NY) ===sessionDay = nyHour >= 18 ? dayofmonth(time, tz) : dayofmonth(time - 86400000, tz)// === DETECT NEW SESSION ===newSession = sessionDay != sessionDay[1]// === STORAGE ===var line[] lines = array.new_line()var label[] labels = array.new_label()// === CLEAR OLD LINES ===if newSession and array.size(lines) > 0    for i = 0 to array.size(lines) - 1        line.delete(array.get(lines, i))        label.delete(array.get(labels, i))    array.clear(lines)    array.clear(labels)// === TIME CHECK ===isTime(h, m) =>    nyHour == h and nyMin == m// === CREATE LINE ===createLine(txt, price) =>    l = line.new(bar_index, price, bar_index, price, color=lineColor, style=line.style_dotted, width=1)    lb = label.new(bar_index, price, txt, style=label.style_label_left, textcolor=color.white, size=size.tiny, color=color.new(color.black, 70))    array.push(lines, l)    array.push(labels, lb)// === CONDITIONS ===if isTime(18, 0)    createLine("18:00 NY", open)if isTime(22, 0)    createLine("22:00 NY", open)if isTime(2, 0)    createLine("02:00 NY", open)if isTime(6, 0)    createLine("06:00 NY", open)if isTime(9, 30)    createLine("09:30 NY", open)if isTime(10, 0)    createLine("10:00 NY", open)// === UPDATE LINES TO CURRENT BAR ===if array.size(lines) > 0    for i = 0 to array.size(lines) - 1        l = array.get(lines, i)        line.set_x2(l, bar_index)        lb = array.get(labels, i)        label.set_x(lb, bar_index)
description: this can show you every H4 candle open time, dotted lines and stamp levels.

name: IlcitRnE
title: Daily Bottom Trendline + Rainbow Arc — Indicator by getrich03 — TradingView
source: //@version=6indicator("Daily Bottom Trendline + Rainbow Arc", overlay=true, max_lines_count=100, max_labels_count=100)// =========================// Inputs// =========================groupPivot = "Daily Bottom Detection"pivotLeft  = input.int(5, "Pivot Left", minval=1, group=groupPivot)pivotRight = input.int(5, "Pivot Right", minval=1, group=groupPivot)showBottom = input.bool(true, "Show Bottom Label", group=groupPivot)groupArc   = "Rainbow Arc"showArc    = input.bool(true, "Show Rainbow Arc", group=groupArc)baseMult   = input.float(1.0, "Base Arc Multiplier", minval=0.1, step=0.1, group=groupArc)curvePower = input.float(0.55, "Curve Power", minval=0.1, step=0.05, group=groupArc)spacing    = input.float(0.18, "Band Spacing", minval=0.01, step=0.01, group=groupArc)groupVis   = "Visual"showMid    = input.bool(true, "Show Mid Arc", group=groupVis)showBands  = input.bool(true, "Show Rainbow Bands", group=groupVis)// =========================// Daily pivot low// =========================dPivotLow = request.security(    syminfo.tickerid,    "D",    ta.pivotlow(low, pivotLeft, pivotRight),    gaps=barmerge.gaps_off,    lookahead=barmerge.lookahead_off)dTime = request.security(    syminfo.tickerid,    "D",    time,    gaps=barmerge.gaps_off,    lookahead=barmerge.lookahead_off)newDailyPivot = not na(dPivotLow) and na(dPivotLow[1])// =========================// Store latest daily bottom// =========================var float baseLow = navar int   baseTime = naif newDailyPivot    baseLow  := dPivotLow    baseTime := dTime    if showBottom        label.new(            x=baseTime,            y=baseLow,            xloc=xloc.bar_time,            text="Bottom",            style=label.style_label_up,            color=color.new(color.green, 0),            textcolor=color.white,            size=size.small        )// =========================// Arc calculation// =========================// 日数経過daysFromBase = na(baseTime) ? na : math.max((time - baseTime) / 86400000.0, 0)// 滑らかなアーチf_arc(mult) =>    na(baseLow) or na(daysFromBase) ? na : baseLow * (1 + baseMult * mult * math.pow(daysFromBase + 1, curvePower) / 100)// 中央アーチmidArc = showArc ? f_arc(1.00) : na// レインボーバンドarc1 = showArc ? f_arc(1.00 - spacing * 3) : naarc2 = showArc ? f_arc(1.00 - spacing * 2) : naarc3 = showArc ? f_arc(1.00 - spacing * 1) : naarc4 = showArc ? f_arc(1.00) : naarc5 = showArc ? f_arc(1.00 + spacing * 1) : naarc6 = showArc ? f_arc(1.00 + spacing * 2) : naarc7 = showArc ? f_arc(1.00 + spacing * 3) : na// =========================// Plots// =========================p1 = plot(showBands ? arc1 : na, title="Arc 1", color=color.new(color.purple, 0), linewidth=1)p2 = plot(showBands ? arc2 : na, title="Arc 2", color=color.new(color.blue, 0), linewidth=1)p3 = plot(showBands ? arc3 : na, title="Arc 3", color=color.new(color.aqua, 0), linewidth=1)p4 = plot(showMid   ? arc4 : na, title="Arc Mid", color=color.new(color.yellow, 0), linewidth=2)p5 = plot(showBands ? arc5 : na, title="Arc 5", color=color.new(color.lime, 0), linewidth=1)p6 = plot(showBands ? arc6 : na, title="Arc 6", color=color.new(color.orange, 0), linewidth=1)p7 = plot(showBands ? arc7 : na, title="Arc 7", color=color.new(color.red, 0), linewidth=1)
description: Daily Bottom Trendline + Rainbow ArcAn advanced indicator that combines daily bottom-based trendlines with smooth rainbow arcs to visualize market structure and long-term price trajectory.FeaturesAutomatic detection of daily pivot lowsTrendlines connecting key bottomsSmooth rainbow arcs based on time progressionVisual support zones and growth curves👉 Understand both trend direction and long-term positioning at a glanceDaily Bottom Trendline + Rainbow Arc日足レベルのボトムを基準に、トレンドラインと滑らかなアーチ（レインボーカーブ）を同時に描画するインジケーター。トレンドの方向と、時間経過による価格の“成長軌道”を一目で把握できます。主な機能日足のピボット安値を自動検出ボトム同士を結ぶトレンドライン時間経過に応じて広がるレインボーアーチサポートゾーンの視覚化👉 「今が安いのか高いのか」を構造的に判断できる

//@version=6indicator("Large Mid Cap Momentum Noah", overlay=true, max_labels_count=500, max_boxes_count=100)wrongTimeframe = timeframe.period != "5"bgcolor(wrongTimeframe ? color.new(#ff0000, 70) : na, title="Wrong Timeframe")obBars = input.int(3, "OB Formation Bars", minval=2, maxval=10, group="Order Block")obWickPct = input.float(15.0, "OB Min Wick PCT", minval=5.0, maxval=50.0, step=1.0, group="Order Block")showOB = input.bool(true, "Show OB Boxes", group="Order Block")stopDist = input.float(1.5, "Stop Distance Dollars", minval=0.25, maxval=3.0, step=0.25, group="Entry")halfMult = input.float(2.0, "Cover Half at X times stop", minval=1.0, maxval=5.0, step=0.25, group="Entry")volLookback = input.int(10, "Volume Lookback", minval=5, maxval=50, group="Entry")volThresh = input.float(1.5, "Volume Surge Multiplier", minval=1.0, maxval=5.0, step=0.25, group="Entry")minAbsVol = input.int(50000, "Min Absolute Volume", minval=1000, maxval=500000, step=1000, group="Entry")bosCount = input.int(2, "Candles to Confirm BOS", minval=1, maxval=5, group="BOS")exhaustBars = input.int(4, "Exhaustion Bars", minval=2, maxval=10, group="BOS")swingLen = input.int(10, "Swing Lookback", minval=1, maxval=25, group="BOS")emaLen = input.int(9, "EMA Length", minval=3, maxval=50, group="EMA")avgVol = ta.sma(volume, volLookback)volRatio = volume / avgVolema9 = ta.ema(close, emaLen)isBull = close >= openvolOk = volRatio >= volThresh and volume >= minAbsVolisSession = (hour(time) == 9 and minute(time) >= 30) or (hour(time) >= 10 and hour(time) < 16)isOpen = hour(time) == 9 and minute(time) == 30cRange = high - lowuWick = high - math.max(open, close)lWick = math.min(open, close) - lowuWickPct = cRange > 0 ? (uWick / cRange) * 100 : 0.0lWickPct = cRange > 0 ? (lWick / cRange) * 100 : 0.0isBattle = uWickPct >= obWickPct or lWickPct >= obWickPctvar int bCount = 0var float obTop = 0.0var float obBot = 999999.0var bool obReady = falsevar float obHi = 0.0var float obLo = 0.0var int obStart = 0var bool Half := true        halfDone := true    if rawSLS        isSLS := true        inShort := false        entryP := 0.0        sStop := 0.0        halfDone := false        bosC := 0        exhC := 0        bCount := 0        obTop := 0.0        obBot := 999999.0        obReady := false    else if rawCover        isCover := true        inShort := false        entryP := 0.0        sStop := 0.0        halfDone := false        bosC := 0        exhC := 0        bCount := 0        obTop := 0.0        obBot := 999999.0        obReady := falsebCol = volOk and isBull ? color.new(#00e676, 0) : color.new(#26a69a, 0)cCol = isBull ? bCol : color.new(#ef5350, 0)borCol = isBull ? color.new(color.gray, 80) : color.new(#ffd600, 0)plotcandle(open, high, low, close, color=cCol, wickcolor=cCol, bordercolor=borCol)bgcolor(inLong ? color.new(#00c853, 96) : inShort ? color.new(#d50000, 96) : na, title="Position BG")plot(inLong ? lStop : na, "Long SL", color=color.new(#ffd600, 40), linewidth=1, style=plot.style_stepline)plot(inShort ? sStop : na, "Short SL", color=color.new(#ffd600, 40), linewidth=1, style=plot.style_stepline)plot(inLong and not halfDone ? halfT : na, "Half Long", color=color.new(#ff6d00, 40), linewidth=1, style=plot.style_stepline)plot(inShort and not halfDone ? halfT : na, "Half Short", color=color.new(#ff6d00, 40), linewidth=1, style=plot.style_stepline)plot(inLong ? swLoEntry : na, "BOS Long", color=color.new(#ffffff, 70), linewidth=1, style=plot.style_stepline)plot(inShort ? swHiEntry : na, "BOS Short", color=color.new(#ffffff, 70), linewidth=1, style=plot.style_stepline)plotshape(isGO, title="GO", location=location.belowbar, style=shape.labelup, size=size.large, color=color.new(#00c853, 0), textcolor=color.white, text="GO")plotshape(isStop, title="STOP", location=location.abovebar, style=shape.labeldown, size=size.large, color=color.new(#d50000, 0), textcolor=color.white, text="STOP")plotshape(isSL, title="SL", location=location.abovebar, style=shape.labeldown, size=size ool(true,          title = "Show PWH/PWL",       group = grpPW)colorPWH     = input.color(#7E57C2,      title = "PWH Color",          group = grpPW)colorPWL     = input.color(#7E57C2,      title = "PWL Color",          group = grpPW)pwWidth      = input.int(2,              title = "Line Width",          group = grpPW, minval = 1, maxval = 4)pwStyle      = input.string("Dotted",    title = "Line Style",          group = grpPW, options = ["Solid", "Dashed", "Dotted"])// --- Inputs: Alerts ---var string grpAlerts = "Alert Settings"alertCDH = input.bool(true, title = "CDH Alert On", group = grpAlerts)alertCDL = input.bool(true, title = "CDL Alert On", group = grpAlerts)alertPMH = input.bool(true, title = "PMH Alert On", group = grpAlerts)alertPML = input.bool(true, title = "PML Alert On", group = grpAlerts)alertPDH = input.bool(true, title = "PDH Alert On", group = grpAlerts)alertPDL = input.bool(true, title = "PDL Alert On", group = grpAlerts)alertPWH = input.bool(true, title = "PWH Alert On", group = grpAlerts)alertPWL = input.bool(true, title = "PWL Alert On", group = grpAlerts)// --- Line style helpers ---cdhLineStyle = cdhStyle == "Dashed" ? line.style_dashed : cdhStyle == "Dotted" ? line.style_dotted : line.style_solidpmLineStyle  = pmStyle  == "Dashed" ? line.style_dashed : pmStyle  == "Dotted" ? line.style_dotted : line.style_solidpdLineStyle  = pdStyle  == "Dashed" ? line.style_dashed : pdStyle  == "Dotted" ? line.style_dotted : line.style_solidpwLineStyle  = pwStyle  == "Dashed" ? line.style_dashed : pwStyle  == "Dotted" ? line.style_dotted : line.style_solid// --- Premarket tracking ---var float pmHighFinal = navar float pmLowFinal  = navar float pmHighLive  = navar float pmLowLive   = navar bool  pmDone      = falseisNewDay    = ta.change(time("D")) != 0inPremarket = (hour >= 4 and hour < 9) or (hour == 9 and minute < 30)sessionOpen = hour == 9 and minute == 30if isNewDay    pmHighLive  := na    pmLowLive   := na    pmHighFinal := na    pmLowFinal  := na    pmDone      := falseif inPremarket and not pmDone    pmHighLive := na(pmHighLive) ? high : math.max(pmHighLive, high)    pmLowLive  := na(pmLowLive)  ? low  : math.min(pmLowLive,  low)if sessionOpen and not pmDone    pmHighFinal := pmHighLive    pmLowFinal  := pmLowLive    pmDone      := truepmH = na(pmHighFinal) ? pmHighLive : pmHighFinalpmL = na(pmLowFinal)  ? pmLowLive  : pmLowFinal// --- Current day H/L ---cdh = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, "D", high, lookahead = barmerge.lookahead_on)cdl = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, "D", low,  lookahead = barmerge.lookahead_on)// --- Previous day H/L ---pdh = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, "D", high[1], lookahead = barmerge.lookahead_on)pdl = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, "D", low[1],  lookahead = barmerge.lookahead_on)// --- Previous week H/L ---pwh = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, "W", high[1], lookahead = barmerge.lookahead_on)pwl = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, "W", low[1],  lookahead = barmerge.lookahead_on)// --- CDH/CDL Lines ---var line highLine = navar line lowLine  = naif bar_index == 0    highLine := line.new(bar_index, cdh, bar_index + 1, cdh, extend = extend.right, color = colorCDH, width = cdhWidth, style = cdhLineStyle)    lowLine  := line.new(bar_index, cdl, bar_index + 1, cdl, extend = extend.right, color = colorCDL, width = cdhWidth, style = cdhLineStyle)if showCDH    line.set_y1(highLine, cdh)    line.set_y2(highLine, cdh)    line.set_y1(lowLine,  cdl)    line.set_y2(lowLine,  cdl)    line.set_color(highLine, colorCDH)    line.set_color(lowLine,  colorCDL)    line.set_width(highLine, cdhWidth)    line.set_width(lowLine,  cdhWidth)    line.set_style(highLine, cdhLineStyle)    line.set_style(lowLine,  cdhLineStyle)else    line.set_color(highLine, color.new(color.white, 100))    line.set_color(lowLine,  color.new(color.white, 100))// --- CDH/CDL Labels ---var label highLabel = navar label lowLabel  = naif bar_index == 0    highLabel := label.new(bar_index, cdh, text = "", color = colorCDH, textcolor = textColorCDH, style = label.style_label_down, size = size.normal)    lowLabel  := label.new(bar_index, cdl, text = "", color = colorCDL, textcolor = textColorCDL, style = label.style_label_up,   size = size.normal)if showCDH    label.set_x(highLabel, bar_index + 2)    label.set_y(highLabel, cdh)    label.set_text(highLabel, "CDH " + str.tostring(cdh, format.mintick))    label.set_color(highLabel, colorCDH)    label.set_textcolor(highLabel, textColorCDH)    label.set_x(lowLabel, bar_index + 2)    label.set_y(lowLabel, cdl)    label.set_text(lowLabel, "CDL " + str.tostring(cdl, format.mintick))    label.set_color(lowLabel, colorCDL)    label.set_textcolor(lowLabel, textColorCDL)else    label.set_text(highLabel, "")    label.set_text(lowLabel,  "")    label.set_color(highLabel, color.new(color.white, 100))    label.set_color(lowLabel,  color.new(color.white, 100))// --- PMH/PML Lines ---var line pmHighLine = navar line pmLowLine  = naif not na(pmH) and na(pmHighLine)    pmHighLine := line.new(bar_index, pmH, bar_index + 1, pmH,         extend = extend.right, color = colorPMH, width = pmWidth, style = pmLineStyle)if not na(pmL) and na(pmLowLine)    pmLowLine := line.new(bar_index, pmL, bar_index + 1, pmL,         extend = extend.right, color = colorPML, width = pmWidth, style = pmLineStyle)if not na(pmHighLine)    if showPM        line.set_y1(pmHighLine, pmH)        line.set_y2(pmHighLine, pmH)        line.set_color(pmHighLine, colorPMH)        line.set_width(pmHighLine, pmWidth)        line.set_style(pmHighLine, pmLineStyle)    else        line.set_color(pmHighLine, color.new(color.white, 100))if not na(pmLowLine)    if showPM        line.set_y1(pmLowLine, pmL)        line.set_y2(pmLowLine, pmL)        line.set_color(pmLowLine, colorPML)        line.set_width(pmLowLine, pmWidth)        line.set_style(pmLowLine, pmLineStyle)    else        line.set_color(pmLowLine, color.new(color.white, 100))// --- PMH/PML Labels ---var label pmHighLabel = navar label pmLowLabel  = naif not na(pmH) and na(pmHighLabel)    pmHighLabel := label.new(         bar_index + 2, pmH, text = "",         color = color.new(color.white, 100),         textcolor = colorPMH,         style = label.style_none,         size = size.normal)if not na(pmL) and na(pmLowLabel)    pmLowLabel := label.new(         bar_index + 2, pmL, text = "",         color = color.new(color.white, 100),         textcolor = colorPML,         style = label.style_none,         size = size.normal)if not na(pmHighLabel)    if showPM        label.set_x(pmHighLabel, bar_index + 2)        label.set_y(pmHighLabel, pmH)        label.set_text(pmHighLabel, "PMH " + str.tostring(pmH, format.mintick))        label.set_textcolor(pmHighLabel, colorPMH)    else        label.set_text(pmHighLabel, "")if not na(pmLowLabel)    if showPM        label.set_x(pmLowLabel, bar_index + 2)        label.set_y(pmLowLabel, pmL)        label.set_text(pmLowLabel, "PML " + str.tostring(pmL, format.mintick))        label.set_textcolor(pmLowLabel, colorPML)    else        label.set_text(pmLowLabel, "")// --- PDH/PDL Lines ---var line pdhLine = navar line pdlLine = naif bar_index == 0    pdhLine := line.new(bar_index, pdh, bar_index + 1, pdh, extend = extend.right, color = color.new(colorPDH, 25), width = pdWidth, style = pdLineStyle)    pdlLine := line.new(bar_index, pdl, bar_index + 1, pdl, extend = extend.right, color = color.new(colorPDL, 25), width = pdWidth, style = pdLineStyle)if showPD    line.set_y1(pdhLine, pdh)    line.set_y2(pdhLine, pdh)    line.set_y1(pdlLine, pdl)    line.set_y2(pdlLine, pdl)    line.set_color(pdhLine, color.new(colorPDH, 25))    line.set_color(pdlLine, color.new(colorPDL, 25))    line.set_width(pdhLine, pdWidth)    line.set_width(pdlLine, pdWidth)    line.set_style(pdhLine, pdLineStyle)    line.set_style(pdlLine, pdLineStyle)else    line.set_color(pdhLine, color.new(color.white, 100))    line.set_color(pdlLine, color.new(color.white, 100))// --- PDH/PDL Labels ---var labe

name: AG Pro Repricing Belt Engine
title: AG Pro Repricing Belt Engine [AGPro Series] — Indicator by AGProLabs — TradingView
source: DESC:AG Pro Repricing Belt Engine [AGPro Series]━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━OVERVIEW / WHAT IT DOESThe "AG Pro Repricing Belt Engine" is an overlay indicator that identifies repricing belts — the compact price bands where the market digests a fresh displacement impulse — and then tracks how price interacts with each belt on its first revisit.Whenever the engine detects a qualifying impulse bar (a candle with a body size above a configurable ATR multiple and a high body-to-range ratio), it automatically draws a belt band anchored to that impulse's body. From that moment on, the belt is kept alive and monitored. Each revisit is classified according to its depth and the closing location, producing a compact, readable state for every zone: Active, Held, Shallow, Failed, or Expired.A top-right status panel summarizes the current context: the number of active belts, the current belt's directional side and price position relative to it, the recent belt bias, and counts of recent Held, Shallow, and Failed resolutions.━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━UNIQUE EDGE (WHY IT IS NOT A BASIC MASHUP)Most supply/demand or zone scripts build their zones from swing pivots or static breakouts. This engine is different: it is impulse-triggered and lifecycle-based. A belt is only born when a decisive displacement prints, and it remains under supervision as long as the script is running.Three design choices set this engine apart:1. Impulse filter. A belt never forms on a weak candle. The bar must deliver a minimum displacement measured in ATR units AND close decisively, so narrow-body wicks never become zones.2. Qualifying-touch model. A revisit only promotes a belt's state when price meaningfully enters the band — not when a distant wick grazes an edge. A dynamic minimum depth (scaled by ATR and by the belt's own width) filters out accidental contacts.3. Two-stage lifecycle. Held is not a terminal state. A belt that first prints "Belt Held" can later be upgraded to "Shallow Reject" or "Belt Failed" if price action deteriorates. This reflects how digestion zones actually behave: a clean first reaction does not guarantee the zone will hold forever.━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━METHODOLOGYImpulse detectionA candle qualifies as an impulse when |close − open| ≥ Impulse Threshold × ATR(14) AND |close − open| / (high − low) ≥ Min Body / Range Ratio. A cooldown is enforced between consecutive belt formations to prevent back-to-back clustering after extended trends.Belt constructionThree width modes are available:- Auto (Body) — belt spans from the impulse body low to the impulse body high.- ATR Scaled (default) — belt spans ±(ATR Width Half-Span × ATR) around the impulse body midpoint. Produces a visibly consistent band across timeframes.- Body 70% — belt compresses to the inner 70% of the body for a tighter zone.Qualifying touchPrice must penetrate the band by at least max(Min Touch Depth × ATR, 25% of belt height) to be recognized as a real revisit. name: SP500 PST
title: SP500-PST — Indicator by OneStellar — TradingView
source:
//@version=6
indicator(title="S&P 500 Progressive Session Tracker", shorttitle="SP500-PST", overlay=true)

// ===================================================================
//  S&P 500 PROGRESSIVE SESSION TRACKER  (Pine Script v6)
//
//  HOW TO GET YOUR TOP 10 S&P 500 TICKERS:
//  ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  Pine Script CANNOT loop over 500 tickers on its own.
//  TradingView's SCREENER runs this indicator across all symbols.
//
//  STEP-BY-STEP TO GET YOUR MONTHLY TOP 10:
//  1. Add this indicator to any chart (any S&P 500 stock, 5m/15m/30m)
//  2. Enable Extended Hours: Chart Settings > Symbol > Extended Hours ON
//  3. Go to: TradingView top menu > Screener > Stock Screener
//  4. Set Market = United States, Index = S&P 500
//  5. Click "Filters" > Add Filter > Indicators > SP500-PST
//  6. Filter: "30d Appearances" >= your threshold (e.g. 5)
//  7. Sort column "30d Appearances" DESCENDING
//  8. Top 10 rows = your highest-frequency progressive session stocks
//  9. Save as a Watchlist for daily monitoring
//
//  QUALIFICATION CRITERIA (all 4 must be true each day):
//    1. Prev Close  -> Pre-Market Open  : gain >= min threshold
//    2. Pre-Mkt Open -> Regular Open    : positive gain
//    3. Regular Open -> Regular Close   : gain >= min threshold
//    4. Regular Close -> Post-Mkt Close : gain >= min threshold
// ===================================================================

// --- INPUTS ---------------------------------------------------------
lookback       = input.int(30,    "Rolling Window (days)",       minval=5,   maxval=90,  group="Core Settings")
topN           = input.int(10,    "Top-N Threshold (frequency)", minval=1,   maxval=30,  group="Core Settings")
pmGainMin      = input.float(0.0, "Min Pre-Market Gain %",       minval=0.0, maxval=5.0, step=0.05, group="Core Settings")
regularGainMin = input.float(0.0, "Min Regular Session Gain %",  minval=0.0, maxval=5.0, step=0.05, group="Core Settings")
postGainMin    = input.float(0.0, "Min Post-Market Gain %",      minval=0.0, maxval=5.0, step=0.05, group="Core Settings")
showTable      = input.bool(true,  "Show Stats Table",   group="Display")
showLabels     = input.bool(true,  "Show Bar Labels",    group="Display")
tblSize        = input.string("normal", "Table Text Size", options=["tiny","small","normal","large"], group="Display")
bgQualColor    = input.color(color.new(color.green, 82), "Qualifying Bar BG",  group="Display")
bgRepeatColor  = input.color(color.new(color.teal,  72), "Top-N Repeat Bar BG",group="Display")

// --- RESOLVE TABLE TEXT SIZE ----------------------------------------
resolvedSize =
     tblSize == "large"  ? size.large  :
     tblSize == "normal" ? size.normal :
     tblSize == "small"  ? size.small  :
     size.tiny

// --- SESSION DATA ---------------------------------------------------
prevDayClose = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, "D",
     close[1], lookahead=barmerge.lookahead_off)

preMktOpen   = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, "D",
     open, lookahead=barmerge.lookahead_off, gaps=barmerge.gaps_off)

regOpen      = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, "D",
     open, lookahead=barmerge.lookahead_off)

regClose     = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, "D",
     close, lookahead=barmerge.lookahead_off)

postMktClose = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, "D",
     close, lookahead=barmerge.lookahead_off)

// --- QUALIFICATION LOGIC --------------------------------------------
isNewDay = ta.change(time("D")) != 0

pctChange(fromVal, toVal) =>
    fromVal != 0 ? ((toVal - fromVal) / math.abs(fromVal)) * 100.0 : 0.0

gain1_PreMkt  = pctChange(prevDayClose, preMktOpen)
gain2_RegOpen = pctChange(preMktOpen,   regOpen)
gain3_RegSess = pctChange(regOpen,      regClose)
gain4_PostMkt = pctChange(regClose,     postMktClose)

qualifiesThisDay =
     gain1_PreMkt  >= pmGainMin      and
     gain2_RegOpen >= 0.0            and
     gain3_RegSess >= regularGainMin and
     gain4_PostMkt >= postGainMin

// --- ROLLING COUNT --------------------------------------------------
qualDaily    = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, "D",
     qualifiesThisDay ? 1 : 0, lookahead=barmerge.lookahead_off)

rollingCount = math.round(math.sum(qualDaily, lookback))
isTopN       = rollingCount >= topN

// Expose as a plot so TradingView Screener can read it
plot(rollingCount, title="30d Appearances", display=display.data_window)
plot(qualifiesThisDay ? 1 : 0, title="Qualifies Today", display=display.data_window)

// --- BAR HIGHLIGHTS -------------------------------------------------
barBgColor =
     isTopN           ? bgRepeatColor :
     qualifiesThisDay ? bgQualColor   :
     na
bgcolor(barBgColor, title="Session Qualify BG")

// --- LABELS ---------------------------------------------------------
if showLabels and isNewDay and qualifiesThisDay
    labelTxt = str.tostring(rollingCount) + "x/" + str.tostring(lookback) + "d"
    labelBg  = isTopN ? color.new(color.teal, 10) : color.new(color.green, 10)
    label.new(
         x         = bar_index,
         y         = high,
         text      = labelTxt,
         style     = label.style_label_down,
         color     = labelBg,
         textcolor = color.white,
         size      = size.normal)

// --- DASHBOARD TABLE ------------------------------------------------
var table statsTable = table.new(
     position.bottom_right, 2, 10,
     bgcolor      = color.new(color.black, 10),
     border_width = 1,
     border_color = color.new(color.gray, 30),
     frame_width  = 2,
     frame_color  = color.new(color.blue, 20))

tableRow(tbl, rowIdx, lbl, val, valColor) =>
    table.cell(tbl, 0, rowIdx, lbl,
         text_color  = color.silver,
         text_size   = resolvedSize,
         text_halign = text.align_left)
    table.cell(tbl, 1, rowIdx, val,
         text_color  = valColor,
         text_size   = resolvedSize,
         text_halign = text.align_right)

if showTable and barstate.islast
    // Title row
    table.cell(statsTable, 0, 0, "SP500-PST: " + syminfo.ticker,
         text_color  = color.white,
         text_size   = resolvedSize,
         bgcolor     = color.new(color.navy, 5),
         text_halign = text.align_center)
    table.cell(statsTable, 1, 0, "Value",
         text_color  = color.white,
         text_size   = resolvedSize,
         bgcolor     = color.new(color.navy, 5),
         text_halign = text.align_center)
    table.merge_cells(statsTable, 0, 0, 1, 0)

    // Screener reminder row
    table.cell(statsTable, 0, 1, "Top 10 S&P 500: Use Screener",
         text_color  = color.yellow,
         text_size   = resolvedSize,
         bgcolor     = color.new(color.maroon, 30),
         text_halign = text.align_center)
    table.merge_cells(statsTable, 0, 1, 1, 1)

    qualStr   = qualifiesThisDay ? "YES" : "NO"
    qualColor = qualifiesThisDay ? color.lime : color.red
    topNStr   = isTopN ? "YES" : "NO"
    topNColor = isTopN ? color.yellow : color.gray

    tableRow(statsTable, 2, "Window (days)",
         str.tostring(lookback), color.white)
    tableRow(statsTable, 3, "Qualifies Today",
         qualStr, qualColor)
    tableRow(statsTable, 4, "30d Appearances",
         str.tostring(rollingCount) + "x", isTopN ? color.yellow : color.lime)
    tableRow(statsTable, 5, "Top-" + str.tostring(topN) + " Threshold",
         str.tostring(topN) + "x", color.white)
    tableRow(statsTable, 6, "In Top-N",
         topNStr, topNColor)
    tableRow(statsTable, 7, "1 PreMkt Gain",
         str.tostring(math.round(gain1_PreMkt,  2)) + "%",
         gain1_PreMkt  >= 0 ? color.lime : color.red)
    tableRow(statsTable, 8, "2 Reg Open Gain",
         str.tostring(math.round(gain2_RegOpen, 2)) + "%",
         gain2_RegOpen >= 0 ? color.lime : color.red)
    tableRow(statsTable, 9, "3 Reg Session Gain",
         str.tostring(math.round(gain3_RegSess, 2)) + "%",
         gain3_RegSess >= 0 ? color.lime : color.red)
